_publications._publicationTitle: Applying microsatellite multiplex PCR analysis (MMPA) for determining allele copy-number status and percentage of normal cells within tumors.

_contextSnippet: ∼15% of microsatellites generated out of range values and thus, were finally not used in the analysis. The number of microsatellites indicating an incorrect AI-mechanism was very low (∼2%)
details: ~15% of microsatellites generated out of range values and were not used in analysis, ~2% indicated incorrect AI-mechanism
